tests.name: starts and persists personal radio DJ through the real Tauri IPC path
persists validated proactive settings after cache-clear native reload
starts exhibition introduction without waiting for ordinary chat

precondition_note: Two preceding diagnostic runs are not counted as acceptance evidence: one intentionally omitted NAIA_AGENT_SCRIPT and NAIA_AGENT_PROTO_DIR and correctly refused to start Agent; the other ran cargo test after the Agent repin but did not rebuild the main naia-shell executable, so the stale debug binary correctly exposed its older embedded pin. The exact cargo build command above rebuilt the executable against the final Agent commit, after which the exact paired WDIO command passed 3/3.
remaining_partial: audible TTS quality on real audio hardware
